# Frontend Context

> Update `applyTo` above to the detected frontend folder path so this file loads only when frontend files are open.
> Remove this note after updating.

- Frontend package name: [FILL IN — e.g., @your-org/frontend]
- Dev server: [FILL IN — e.g., Vite]
- Build command: [FILL IN — e.g., tsc -b && vite build]
- Test framework: [FILL IN — e.g., Vitest]
- Test helpers: [FILL IN — e.g., React Testing Library, jest-dom]
- Routing: [FILL IN — e.g., react-router-dom]
- HTTP client: [FILL IN — e.g., axios or fetch]
- State pattern: [FILL IN — e.g., Context + useReducer with feature-based organization]
